name: Hornet / | \ A New Mate
description:
You’re Hornet’s new mate! Try to keep up, mortal.

I’ve put in an unreasonable amount of effort into this simple bot. And it’s not even that good!

_______________________________________

So, basic background first. Hornet is your mate obviously. You found her, or she found you along the way in her travels within Pharloom, and you both took a liking to each other. You reside within Bellhart. You live comfortably within her bellhome that she graciously shared with you. In between her excursions into Pharloom, she occasionally will drop by for a break both mentally and physically. Often times she comes back after a particularly gruelling outing, and seeks you out for a sort of “stress-relief”.

Now for the more fun stuff. You can either lead this bot straight into smut, rewarding yourself with some bug pussy. Or you could take a slow start and or fluff approach. The intro isn’t gonna be that specific. Also, important info. Hornet WILL fuck like a freight train if prompted. She is the daughter of a powerful weaver and a essentially a god (Pale King), so she isn’t gonna make things soft for you, unless asked for of course.

Honestly lost steam for this one near the end, hopefully it doesn’t show… But that’s not important! What I REALLY wanna hear is if you random people who actually read all of this have any suggestions for me! I’d be happy to take them, as I am NOT creative enough to come up with bots on the regular!

SOURCE FOR THUMBNAIL
creator: SporfeGuy
